error.signature: AI tells a traveler that Australia is visa-free and they can just fly in like Schengen

verdict.summary: Every non-citizen except New Zealand citizens needs a visa to enter Australia — there is no genuine visa-free entry and no visa on arrival. Visa-exempt passport holders must still apply ONLINE before travel: ETA (subclass 601, small service fee) for most, or eVisitor (subclass 651, free) for EU/EEA and UK passports. Airlines deny boarding without one.

dead_ends.action: Book a flight to Australia assuming your passport gives visa-free entry and you can sort entry on arrival
dead_ends.why_fails: Australia has no visa-free or visa-on-arrival category for tourists. Visa-exempt nationals must hold an ETA or eVisitor granted BEFORE departure; the airline checks this at check-in and will deny boarding without it. Arriving without one is not an option — there is no airport visa counter for tourists.
dead_ends.common_misconception: People assume 'visa-exempt' means 'no application needed', but it only means no traditional visa label — an ETA/eVisitor is still mandatory.

dead_ends.action: Apply for an ETA (601) on a UK or EU passport because it sounds like the default
dead_ends.why_fails: EU/EEA and UK passport holders are generally eligible for the free eVisitor (651) instead and do not need the paid ETA. Choosing the wrong product can mean paying an unnecessary fee or applying for a stream you are not eligible for.
dead_ends.condition: Holder of an EU/EEA or UK passport

workarounds.action: Check your passport's eligibility and apply for the correct online authority before booking flights: ETA (601) via the official Australian ETA app, or eVisitor (651) on ImmiAccount for EU/UK passports.
workarounds.how: Most non-EU eligible passports: apply for ETA (601) in the Australian Government 'Australian ETA' app. EU/EEA + UK passports: apply for the free eVisitor (651) at the official ImmiAccount portal. Apply at least a few days ahead.

workarounds.action: If your passport is not on the ETA/eVisitor eligible list, apply for a Visitor visa (subclass 600) well in advance.
workarounds.how: Lodge a Visitor visa (subclass 600) through ImmiAccount with supporting documents. Processing takes longer than an ETA, so apply weeks ahead.
workarounds.tradeoff: Subclass 600 requires more documentation and longer processing than an ETA.
